actions.name: Changelog for all
actions.description: Generates a changelog for all sources by loading JSON data, extracting commit information, and formatting it into an HTML file. It sorts and merges results from multiple sources, uploads artifacts, and creates a release on GitHub with the generated changelog. The workflow can be manually triggered or scheduled to run weekly.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 0:00, on MON

actions.name: Clean repository
actions.description: Cleans the repository by generating a JSON representation of supported releases and desktops from the Armbian build framework. It checks out the framework repository, processes configuration files, and outputs the structured data for further use in subsequent jobs.

actions.name: Build All Stable Artifacts (cronjob)
actions.description: Builds all stable artifacts and prepares them for deployment, including version management and artifact generation. It checks for existing artifacts in OCI, manages user patches, and uploads build information as artifacts. The workflow also generates server lists for deployment and manages Docker images as necessary.

actions.name: Build All Artifacts (cronjob)
actions.description: Builds and prepares artifacts and images for multiple targets, including nightly and stable versions. It manages versioning, checks for existing artifacts, and uploads generated files for further use. The workflow also handles dependencies and configurations for various boards and maintainers, ensuring a comprehensive build process.

actions.name: Build Apps Images (cronjob)
actions.description: Builds application images and manages versioning for multiple targets. Prepares JSON matrices for artifacts and images, while optionally checking for existing OCI artifacts. Handles version bumping and generates release notes based on input parameters.

actions.name: Build Community Images (cronjob)
actions.description: Builds community images and manages versioning for multiple hardware boards. Prepares artifacts and images based on specified parameters, including nightly or stable builds, and uploads the results for further use. Integrates checks for team membership and version bumping within the workflow.

actions.name: Build Nightly Images (cronjob)
actions.description: Builds nightly images and manages versioning for artifacts. Prepares and uploads build artifacts, checks membership, and generates release notes based on the specified branch and board configurations. Supports optional parameters for skipping image builds and checking existing artifacts in OCI.

actions.name: Build Standard Support Images (admin)
actions.description: Builds standard support images for various boards and frameworks, managing versioning and artifact generation. It includes steps for checking team membership, version bumping, and generating HTML reports for releases. The workflow also prepares a JSON matrix for building artifacts and images based on specified parameters.

actions.name: Build One by One (anyone)
actions.description: Builds Armbian images for various targets, releases, and boards based on user-defined inputs. It utilizes specific parameters such as kernel branch, userspace, and user interface options to customize the build process. The output includes virtual images for x86 and arm64 architectures, along with associated metadata.

actions.name: Delete Old Releases
actions.description: Deletes old releases from the repository by identifying and removing both full and pre-releases that exceed a specified limit. It processes releases based on their creation date and removes the oldest ones, ensuring only the most recent releases are retained.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 3:00

actions.name: Download update (admin)
actions.description: Downloads updates from a specified source and synchronizes them to designated servers. Checks membership for authorization, retrieves server details, and performs file synchronization using rsync. Optionally purges incoming files based on user input and refreshes web and redirector indices after synchronization.

actions.name: Enable Hetzner Runners (admin)
actions.description: Enables and disables Hetzner cloud runners based on specified configurations, including machine type and count. Cleans up any existing dangling runners before enabling new ones, and allows for a configurable sleep period between enabling and disabling the runners. Checks team membership before proceeding with operations.
actions.cron_schedule: at 10 minutes past the hour, at 8:00

actions.name: Verify installation (pull request)
actions.description: Verifies installation by downloading and testing external configuration files. Cancels any currently active workflows to ensure only the latest is processed. Utilizes external scripts for the download and test operations, leveraging specific secrets for secure access.
actions.execution_method: pull_request (opened, reopened, edited, synchronize, review_requested), workflow_dispatch

actions.name: Full distro test builds
actions.description: Builds and tests Armbian distribution images for various desktop environments. Generates a JSON output containing supported releases and desktop configurations, then compiles the images based on the specified parameters. The process includes checking out necessary repositories, installing SSH keys, and executing a build script with specific configurations.
actions.cron_schedule: at 00 minutes past the hour, at 5:00

actions.name: Labeler (pull request)
actions.description: Adds labels to pull requests based on modified files to facilitate organization and review processes.

actions.name: Set PR and issues labels from yaml
actions.description: Sets labels for pull requests and issues based on configurations defined in a YAML file. Utilizes a GitHub Action to apply labels specified in '.github/labels.yml', allowing for dynamic labeling based on repository content. Supports dry-run functionality for pull requests to preview label changes without applying them.
actions.execution_method: workflow_dispatch, push to main branch, pull_request

actions.name: Upload live patch script
actions.description: Uploads a live patch script by checking team membership, signing the script with GPG, and transferring it to a remote server. It ensures that only authorized team members can execute the upload process. The script files are also converted to a web-friendly format during the signing process.

actions.name: Recreate Matrix (push)
actions.description: Recreates action for building stable images by checking out necessary repositories, synchronizing user patches, and generating build lists and configuration files for various Armbian targets. It prepares multiple YAML files for different build configurations, including nightly and standard support releases, and manages board configurations and maintainers. The workflow ensures that the latest configurations are used for building images.
actions.cron_schedule: at 00 minutes past the hour, at 5:00

actions.name: Redirector update (cronjob)
actions.description: Checks and validates various mirror servers for debs-beta, debs, archive, and images, and generates corresponding YAML configurations for a redirector. It retrieves data from a database, performs checks against the servers, and uploads the results. Additionally, it cleans up and prepares the necessary YAML files for deployment.
actions.cron_schedule: at 00 minutes past the hour, at 8:00

actions.name: Repository Index sync (auto)
actions.description: Synchronizes files across stable servers and updates the web index for a repository. Retrieves primary mirror details from a database and conditionally syncs files based on their last modified date or a forced sync input. Utilizes SSH for secure file transfer and manages multiple servers in parallel.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, every 4 hours

actions.name: Repository update (admin)
actions.description: Updates the repository by checking membership, downloading external resources, building packages, and synchronizing files to servers. It also refreshes the web and redirector index after the update process. The workflow includes conditional operations based on input parameters and manages package deletions and updates efficiently.

actions.name: Smoke tests (cronjob)
actions.description: Runs various tests with the latest nightly codebase on real hardware, ensuring the integrity and performance of the software. It checks team membership before executing the smoke tests to validate the codebase under specified conditions.
actions.execution_method: schedule, workflow_dispatch with inputs (gitbranch, powermanagement, betaonly), repository_dispatch
actions.cron_schedule: at 30 minutes past the hour, at 5:00

actions.name: TEST TEST TEST
actions.description: Runs scheduled and manual tests, allowing for additional parameters and repository references. Prepares incoming data for deployment by mirroring to a CDN. Utilizes environment variables for repository management and build configurations.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, every 8 hours

actions.name: Watchdog (cronjob)
actions.description: Reruns failed jobs for specified scripts in a GitHub repository by checking the status of previous workflow runs. It attempts to restart workflows up to six times if they fail or are cancelled. This process ensures that builds and tests are consistently executed, improving reliability and stability of the CI/CD pipeline.

actions.name: Generate Download Index in JSON (admin)
actions.description: Generates a JSON index of downloadable files and updates torrent files for Armbian. It checks membership, checks out necessary repositories, installs dependencies, and creates a map of stable files. The workflow then builds a JSON file containing asset information and uploads the generated index and torrent files to a specified server.
